summary: Backend modular refactoring Phase 2 verified successfully. All 17 backend API tests passed. server.py was refactored from ~3370 lines to ~82 lines with route logic extracted to /app/backend/routes/*.py. P0 bug fix for inter-city transfer search (excluding inter-hotel direction) verified working. Frontend loads correctly with login, dashboard, and Trip Builder modal all functional.

root_and_health.GET /api: PASS - Returns API info with Travo DMC message
root_and_health.GET /api/health: PASS - Returns healthy status with timestamp

transfers.GET /api/transfers/inter-city/search: PASS - P0 BUG FIX VERIFIED: No inter-hotel direction transfers returned

airports.GET /api/airports?page=1&limit=10: PASS - Returns paginated airports with pagination metadata

terms_policies.GET /api/terms-policies/all: PASS - Returns all terms and policies

frontend.login_page: PASS - Login form loads with email/password inputs
frontend.dashboard: PASS - Dashboard loads with navigation and booking options
frontend.trip_builder: PASS - Create Trip Package modal opens with all form fields

critical_code_review_comments: server.py successfully refactored to ~82 lines - clean orchestrator pattern
All route modules properly extracted to /app/backend/routes/*.py
P0 bug fix verified: transfers_router uses $ne: 'inter-hotel' to exclude inter-hotel transfers
All routers properly imported and included in api_router
MongoDB _id properly excluded in all route responses using {'_id': 0}

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Login, Dashboard, Trip Builder all working

mocked_list: Aviationstack flight API (requires user API key)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend modular refactoring Phase 2 complete and verified. server.py is now ~82 lines with all route logic in /app/backend/routes/*.py. Key test file: test_modular_backend_refactor.py covers all main endpoints. P0 bug fix for inter-city transfer search verified - uses $ne: 'inter-hotel' to exclude inter-hotel direction transfers. All 17 backend tests pass. Frontend login, dashboard, and Trip Builder modal all working correctly.
